'''Utchakkaloch''', more commonly known as '''Chakk''', was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] who was the son of [[Dewlannamapia]] and was also [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo's]] "adopted brother". Known as Chakk to his friends, this dark brown Wookiee met Han Solo at [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca's]] wedding to [[Mallatobuck/Legends|Mallatobuck]]. He was later present at the funeral of Chewbacca. Chakk was distantly related to Chewbacca, through a second cousin three times removed.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Paradise Snare]]'' {{1stm}}
*''[[Rebel Dawn]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial]]''
